form.label: Top Talkers and Destinations with City Geolocations (DEPRECATED)

search.query: `netflow_index` nfc_id=20867 earliest=$earliest$ | eval cc = mvzip(dest_cc, src_cc, "###") | mvexpand cc | makemv delim="###" cc | stats count by cc

`netflow_search_rule_20867` $geo_src$ | eval src_lat=if(isnull(lat),src_lat,lat) | eval src_lon=if(isnull(lon),src_lon,lon) | eval src_cc=if(isnull(Country),src_cc,Country) | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" src_cc="$country$" src_cc!="QQ" | geostats globallimit=0 latfield=src_lat longfield=src_lon sum(flow_count) by src_ip

`netflow_search_rule_20867` $geo_dest$ | eval dest_lat=if(isnull(lat),dest_lat,lat) | eval dest_lon=if(isnull(lon),dest_lon,lon) | eval dest_cc=if(isnull(Country),dest_cc,Country) | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" dest_cc="$country$" dest_cc!="QQ" | geostats globallimit=0 latfield=dest_lat longfield=dest_lon sum(flow_count) by dest_ip

`netflow_search_rule_20867` $geo_src$ | eval src_lat=if(isnull(lat),src_lat,lat) | eval src_lon=if(isnull(lon),src_lon,lon) | eval src_cc=if(isnull(Country),src_cc,Country) | eval src_city=if(isnull(City),src_city,City) | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" src_cc="$country$" | fillnull value="" src_host | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by exp_ip src_ip | eval exp_ip_host=exp_ip_name."#".src_ip."#".l_src_host | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(bytes_out)` | stats sum(bytes_in) as outbytes sum(bytes_out) as inbytes by exp_ip_host src_cc src_city | table exp_ip_host src_cc src_city outbytes inbytes | eval temp=split(exp_ip_host,"#") | eval exp_ip=mvindex(temp,0) | eval ip=mvindex(temp,1) | eval host=mvindex(temp,2) | eval outbytes = outbytes/1024/1024 | eval inbytes = inbytes/1024/1024 | sort 0 - outbytes | `commas_formatting(MB Received, inbytes,2)` | `commas_formatting(MB Sent, outbytes,2)` | table exp_ip ip host src_cc src_city "MB Sent" "MB Received" | rename exp_ip as Device | rename ip as "Src IP" | rename host as "Src Host" | rename src_cc as "Src Country" | rename src_city as "Src City"

`netflow_search_rule_20867` $geo_dest$ | eval dest_lat=if(isnull(lat),dest_lat,lat) | eval dest_lon=if(isnull(lon),dest_lon,lon) | eval dest_cc=if(isnull(Country),dest_cc,Country) | eval dest_city=if(isnull(City),dest_city,City) | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" dest_cc="$country$" | fillnull value="" dest_host | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | eventstats latest(dest_host) as l_dest_host by exp_ip dest_ip | eval exp_ip_host=exp_ip_name."#".dest_ip."#".l_dest_host | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(bytes_out)` | stats sum(bytes_in) as inbytes sum(bytes_out) as outbytes by exp_ip_host dest_cc dest_city | table exp_ip_host dest_cc dest_city inbytes outbytes | eval temp=split(exp_ip_host,"#") | eval exp_ip=mvindex(temp,0) | eval ip=mvindex(temp,1) | eval host=mvindex(temp,2) | eval inbytes = inbytes/1024/1024 | eval outbytes = outbytes/1024/1024 | sort 0 - inbytes | `commas_formatting(MB Received, inbytes,2)` | `commas_formatting(MB Sent, outbytes,2)` | table exp_ip ip host dest_cc dest_city "MB Received" "MB Sent" | rename exp_ip as Device | rename ip as "Dest IP" | rename host as "Dest Host" | rename dest_cc as "Dest Country" | rename dest_city as "Dest City"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10867: Top Traffic Monitor Geo City” (syslogs with nfc_id=20867). This Module identifies and reports hosts with the most traffic (optionally all hosts). It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. For bidirectional flows the Module stitches request-reply flows inverting source and destination for flows in the opposite direction. It reports consolidated flows separating bytes/packets sent and bytes/packets received. This Module is packaged in NFO “Enhanced Traffic Monitor 2” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
